qa_pairs.question: What happens to the purging assessment if I interact with candidate files between the 1st and the 11th of the month?
qa_pairs.answer: If you access, read, move, or delete some of the candidates between the 1st and the 11th of the month, there won't be any changes in the assessment until the 12th.

qa_pairs.question: How can I tell if my files are no longer scheduled for purging on the 12th of the month?
qa_pairs.answer: If there was an assessment file up until the 11th, but it's no longer present on the 12th, it means you don't have anything to be purged anymore.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I access, read, move, or delete candidate files after the 12th of the month?
qa_pairs.answer: If you access, read, move, or delete some of the candidates after the 12th, you have to check for yourself to confirm your files won't be purged on the 15th.

qa_pairs.question: Is there a section in the document explaining how to check a file's age?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, there is a section titled 'How to check the age of a file?'.
